Normoxia Timepoint TE Similarity

Kate

2026-03-06

Overview

This analysis examines how similar TE (translational efficiency) changes are across normoxia timepoints (1hr, 4hr, 24hr) for si3d vs siCtrl, and how the alltimepoints regression set relates to each individual timepoint. This informs interpretation of the random forest model behavior when using the alltimepoints positive class.

library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggvenn)
library(DT)

Load Data

norm_1hr <- read_csv(here("output/translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_1hr.csv"))
norm_4hr <- read_csv(here("output/translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_4hr.csv"))
norm_24hr <- read_csv(here("output/translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_24hr.csv"))
norm_all <- read_csv(here("output/translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_alltimepoints.csv"))

cat("Gene counts:\n")
## Gene counts:
cat("  1hr:", nrow(norm_1hr), "\n")
##   1hr: 11879
cat("  4hr:", nrow(norm_4hr), "\n")
##   4hr: 11879
cat("  24hr:", nrow(norm_24hr), "\n")
##   24hr: 11879
cat("  alltimepoints:", nrow(norm_all), "\n")
##   alltimepoints: 11879
# Join all four files into a wide data frame on gene_id
wide <- norm_1hr %>%
  select(gene_id, symbol, te_lfc_1hr = te_lfc, te_padj_1hr = te_padj) %>%
  inner_join(
    norm_4hr %>% select(gene_id, te_lfc_4hr = te_lfc, te_padj_4hr = te_padj),
    by = "gene_id"
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    norm_24hr %>% select(gene_id, te_lfc_24hr = te_lfc, te_padj_24hr = te_padj),
    by = "gene_id"
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    norm_all %>% select(gene_id, te_lfc_all = te_lfc, te_padj_all = te_padj),
    by = "gene_id"
  )

cat("Genes after inner join:", nrow(wide), "\n")
## Genes after inner join: 11879

1. Pairwise TE LFC Scatter Plots

# Define significance: te_padj < 0.05 & |te_lfc| > 0.5
sig_threshold_lfc <- 0.5
sig_threshold_padj <- 0.05

wide <- wide %>%
  mutate(
    sig_1hr = te_padj_1hr < sig_threshold_padj & abs(te_lfc_1hr) > sig_threshold_lfc,
    sig_4hr = te_padj_4hr < sig_threshold_padj & abs(te_lfc_4hr) > sig_threshold_lfc,
    sig_24hr = te_padj_24hr < sig_threshold_padj & abs(te_lfc_24hr) > sig_threshold_lfc,
    sig_all = te_padj_all < sig_threshold_padj & abs(te_lfc_all) > sig_threshold_lfc
  )
# Helper: make one scatter panel with Pearson r and Spearman rho annotations
make_scatter <- function(df, x_col, y_col, sig_x_col, sig_y_col,
                         x_label, y_label) {
  # Significance coloring: both, either, neither
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      sig_status = case_when(
        .data[[sig_x_col]] & .data[[sig_y_col]] ~ "Both",
        .data[[sig_x_col]] | .data[[sig_y_col]] ~ "Either",
        TRUE ~ "Neither"
      ),
      sig_status = factor(sig_status, levels = c("Neither", "Either", "Both"))
    )

  x_vals <- df[[x_col]]
  y_vals <- df[[y_col]]
  pearson_r <- cor(x_vals, y_vals, use = "complete.obs", method = "pearson")
  spearman_rho <- cor(x_vals, y_vals, use = "complete.obs", method = "spearman")

  ann_label <- sprintf("r = %.2f\nρ = %.2f", pearson_r, spearman_rho)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = .data[[y_col]], color = sig_status)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.6, alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Neither" = "grey70", "Either" = "#F4A261", "Both" = "#E63946"),
      name = "Significant"
    ) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", alpha = 0.4) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = ann_label,
             hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 3) +
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          axis.title = element_text(size = 9))
}
p_1hr_4hr <- make_scatter(wide, "te_lfc_1hr", "te_lfc_4hr",
                           "sig_1hr", "sig_4hr",
                           "TE LFC (1hr)", "TE LFC (4hr)")

p_1hr_24hr <- make_scatter(wide, "te_lfc_1hr", "te_lfc_24hr",
                            "sig_1hr", "sig_24hr",
                            "TE LFC (1hr)", "TE LFC (24hr)")

p_4hr_24hr <- make_scatter(wide, "te_lfc_4hr", "te_lfc_24hr",
                            "sig_4hr", "sig_24hr",
                            "TE LFC (4hr)", "TE LFC (24hr)")

p_1hr_all <- make_scatter(wide, "te_lfc_1hr", "te_lfc_all",
                           "sig_1hr", "sig_all",
                           "TE LFC (1hr)", "TE LFC (alltimepoints)")

p_4hr_all <- make_scatter(wide, "te_lfc_4hr", "te_lfc_all",
                           "sig_4hr", "sig_all",
                           "TE LFC (4hr)", "TE LFC (alltimepoints)")

p_24hr_all <- make_scatter(wide, "te_lfc_24hr", "te_lfc_all",
                            "sig_24hr", "sig_all",
                            "TE LFC (24hr)", "TE LFC (alltimepoints)")

# Shared legend for sig status
legend_plot <- make_scatter(wide, "te_lfc_1hr", "te_lfc_4hr",
                             "sig_1hr", "sig_4hr", "", "") +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
shared_legend <- get_legend(legend_plot)

scatter_grid <- plot_grid(
  p_1hr_4hr, p_1hr_24hr, p_4hr_24hr,
  p_1hr_all, p_4hr_all, p_24hr_all,
  ncol = 3
)

plot_grid(scatter_grid, shared_legend,
          rel_widths = c(1, 0.12),
          labels = c("Pairwise TE LFC (si3d vs siCtrl, normoxia)", ""),
          label_size = 11)

2. Correlation Matrix Heatmap

te_mat <- wide %>%
  select(te_lfc_1hr, te_lfc_4hr, te_lfc_24hr, te_lfc_all) %>%
  as.matrix()

cor_mat <- cor(te_mat, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")

colnames(cor_mat) <- rownames(cor_mat) <- c("1hr", "4hr", "24hr", "alltimepoints")

pheatmap(
  cor_mat,
  display_numbers = TRUE,
  number_format = "%.3f",
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))(50),
  breaks = seq(0, 1, length.out = 51),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  main = "Spearman correlation of TE LFC across normoxia timepoints\n(si3d vs siCtrl)",
  fontsize_number = 10
)

3. Venn Diagram — Significant TE Upregulation

# Significant upregulation: te_lfc > 0.5 & te_padj < 0.05
sig_up_1hr <- wide %>% filter(te_lfc_1hr > 0.5 & te_padj_1hr < 0.05) %>% pull(gene_id)
sig_up_4hr <- wide %>% filter(te_lfc_4hr > 0.5 & te_padj_4hr < 0.05) %>% pull(gene_id)
sig_up_24hr <- wide %>% filter(te_lfc_24hr > 0.5 & te_padj_24hr < 0.05) %>% pull(gene_id)

cat("Significant TE upregulation (te_lfc > 0.5, te_padj < 0.05):\n")
## Significant TE upregulation (te_lfc > 0.5, te_padj < 0.05):
cat("  1hr:", length(sig_up_1hr), "\n")
##   1hr: 433
cat("  4hr:", length(sig_up_4hr), "\n")
##   4hr: 793
cat("  24hr:", length(sig_up_24hr), "\n")
##   24hr: 638
cat("  Shared across all three:", length(Reduce(intersect, list(sig_up_1hr, sig_up_4hr, sig_up_24hr))), "\n")
##   Shared across all three: 108
cat("  Unique to 1hr:", length(setdiff(sig_up_1hr, union(sig_up_4hr, sig_up_24hr))), "\n")
##   Unique to 1hr: 207
cat("  Unique to 4hr:", length(setdiff(sig_up_4hr, union(sig_up_1hr, sig_up_24hr))), "\n")
##   Unique to 4hr: 482
cat("  Unique to 24hr:", length(setdiff(sig_up_24hr, union(sig_up_1hr, sig_up_4hr))), "\n")
##   Unique to 24hr: 331
cat("  1hr ∩ 4hr (not 24hr):", length(setdiff(intersect(sig_up_1hr, sig_up_4hr), sig_up_24hr)), "\n")
##   1hr ∩ 4hr (not 24hr): 61
cat("  1hr ∩ 24hr (not 4hr):", length(setdiff(intersect(sig_up_1hr, sig_up_24hr), sig_up_4hr)), "\n")
##   1hr ∩ 24hr (not 4hr): 57
cat("  4hr ∩ 24hr (not 1hr):", length(setdiff(intersect(sig_up_4hr, sig_up_24hr), sig_up_1hr)), "\n")
##   4hr ∩ 24hr (not 1hr): 142
venn_list_up <- list(
  "1hr" = sig_up_1hr,
  "4hr" = sig_up_4hr,
  "24hr" = sig_up_24hr
)

ggvenn(
  venn_list_up,
  fill_color = c("#457B9D", "#A8DADC", "#E63946"),
  stroke_size = 0.5,
  set_name_size = 5,
  text_size = 4
) +
  labs(title = "Significant TE upregulation by timepoint\n(si3d vs siCtrl, normoxia; te_lfc > 0.5, te_padj < 0.05)")

4. Jaccard Similarity Table

jaccard <- function(a, b) {
  length(intersect(a, b)) / length(union(a, b))
}

# Upregulated gene sets
sig_sets <- list(
  "1hr" = sig_up_1hr,
  "4hr" = sig_up_4hr,
  "24hr" = sig_up_24hr,
  "alltimepoints" = wide %>% filter(te_lfc_all > 0.5 & te_padj_all < 0.05) %>% pull(gene_id)
)

pairs <- combn(names(sig_sets), 2, simplify = FALSE)

jaccard_df <- map_dfr(pairs, function(p) {
  tibble(
    Set_A = p[1],
    Set_B = p[2],
    n_A = length(sig_sets[[p[1]]]),
    n_B = length(sig_sets[[p[2]]]),
    n_intersect = length(intersect(sig_sets[[p[1]]], sig_sets[[p[2]]])),
    jaccard = round(jaccard(sig_sets[[p[1]]], sig_sets[[p[2]]]), 3)
  )
})

datatable(jaccard_df,
          caption = "Jaccard similarity of significant TE upregulation gene sets",
          options = list(pageLength = 10))

5. Rank Correlation Bar Chart

# For genes significant in at least one timepoint (excluding alltimepoints)
sig_any <- wide %>%
  filter(sig_1hr | sig_4hr | sig_24hr)

cat("Genes significant in at least one timepoint:", nrow(sig_any), "\n")
## Genes significant in at least one timepoint: 1434
# Compute pairwise Spearman rank correlations on te_lfc among these genes
pairs_lfc <- list(
  c("te_lfc_1hr", "te_lfc_4hr"),
  c("te_lfc_1hr", "te_lfc_24hr"),
  c("te_lfc_4hr", "te_lfc_24hr"),
  c("te_lfc_1hr", "te_lfc_all"),
  c("te_lfc_4hr", "te_lfc_all"),
  c("te_lfc_24hr", "te_lfc_all")
)

pair_labels <- c("1hr vs 4hr", "1hr vs 24hr", "4hr vs 24hr",
                 "1hr vs alltimepoints", "4hr vs alltimepoints", "24hr vs alltimepoints")

rank_cor_df <- map2_dfr(pairs_lfc, pair_labels, function(p, lbl) {
  rho <- cor(sig_any[[p[1]]], sig_any[[p[2]]], method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  tibble(pair = lbl, spearman_rho = rho)
})

rank_cor_df <- rank_cor_df %>%
  mutate(pair = factor(pair, levels = pair_labels),
         comparison_type = ifelse(grepl("alltimepoints", pair), "vs alltimepoints", "timepoint vs timepoint"))

ggplot(rank_cor_df, aes(x = pair, y = spearman_rho, fill = comparison_type)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(spearman_rho, 3)), vjust = -0.4, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("timepoint vs timepoint" = "#457B9D",
                                "vs alltimepoints" = "#E76F51"),
                    name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Spearman ρ",
    title = "Rank correlation of TE LFC among genes significant at ≥1 timepoint"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "top")

6. Summary of Gene Set Sizes

n_1hr <- length(sig_up_1hr)
n_4hr <- length(sig_up_4hr)
n_24hr <- length(sig_up_24hr)
n_all_tp <- length(sig_sets[["alltimepoints"]])

n_1of3 <- wide %>%
  mutate(n_sig = (te_lfc_1hr > 0.5 & te_padj_1hr < 0.05) +
                  (te_lfc_4hr > 0.5 & te_padj_4hr < 0.05) +
                  (te_lfc_24hr > 0.5 & te_padj_24hr < 0.05)) %>%
  filter(n_sig == 1) %>% nrow()

n_2of3 <- wide %>%
  mutate(n_sig = (te_lfc_1hr > 0.5 & te_padj_1hr < 0.05) +
                  (te_lfc_4hr > 0.5 & te_padj_4hr < 0.05) +
                  (te_lfc_24hr > 0.5 & te_padj_24hr < 0.05)) %>%
  filter(n_sig == 2) %>% nrow()

n_3of3 <- wide %>%
  mutate(n_sig = (te_lfc_1hr > 0.5 & te_padj_1hr < 0.05) +
                  (te_lfc_4hr > 0.5 & te_padj_4hr < 0.05) +
                  (te_lfc_24hr > 0.5 & te_padj_24hr < 0.05)) %>%
  filter(n_sig == 3) %>% nrow()

summary_tbl <- tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Significant at 1hr", "Significant at 4hr", "Significant at 24hr",
    "Significant in alltimepoints regression",
    "Significant in exactly 1-of-3 timepoints",
    "Significant in exactly 2-of-3 timepoints",
    "Significant in all 3 timepoints"
  ),
  N_genes = c(n_1hr, n_4hr, n_24hr, n_all_tp, n_1of3, n_2of3, n_3of3)
)

datatable(summary_tbl,
          caption = "Gene set sizes: significant TE upregulation (te_lfc > 0.5, te_padj < 0.05)",
          options = list(pageLength = 10, dom = "t"))
